Build types, one studio

0–2 wk

From kickoff to a live site

Why most builds fall flat

A website should earn its keep — not just sit there.

The problem

A site that looks fine but never brings in work

The answer

Every page is built around one action and measured against it. Layout, copy, and speed all push toward the enquiry.

The problem

Quotes full of jargon and moving numbers

The answer

Fixed tiers, written scope, and a price agreed before a line of code is written. No surprises on the invoice.

The problem

Being locked into an agency to change a word

The answer

You own the finished source code outright. Stay on a care plan or take it in-house whenever you like.

The problem

Slow, fragile builds that age badly

The answer

A modern Next.js stack tuned for Core Web Vitals — fast on launch day and easy to extend for years after.

Selected work

Real builds, shipped and running in production.

Discuss your project
BIG FRESH

Multi-branch grocery e-commerce

BIG FRESH

Challenge
Seven stores needed one ordering system that knew which branch could actually deliver to each customer.
Solution
A Next.js storefront with Haversine delivery-radius logic, time-slot collection, and a live admin dashboard across all locations.
Outcome
One catalogue, seven branches, delivery and Click & Collect from a single codebase.
  • Next.js
  • TypeScript
  • Prisma
  • Stripe
  • Supabase
OrderTrackiz

Multi-tenant logistics SaaS

OrderTrackiz

Challenge
Wholesale produce runs needed live delivery tracking and CHEP pallet returns kept strictly separate per business.
Solution
Tenant-isolated architecture, driver workflows, pallet reconciliation, and a real-time operations dashboard.
Outcome
Drivers, businesses, and admins on one platform with data walled off per tenant.
  • Next.js
  • Prisma
  • PostgreSQL
  • Recharts
  • Vercel
Village Spice Mart

Independent grocer storefront

Village Spice Mart

Challenge
A local grocer wanted online orders without losing the feel of the shop or paying marketplace commissions.
Solution
A branded store with 150+ products, Click & Collect scheduling, Stripe checkout, and transactional email.
Outcome
A commission-free storefront the owner runs themselves, live in under three weeks.
  • Next.js
  • Tailwind
  • Stripe
  • Resend
What I build

One studio, eleven kinds of build — each priced upfront.

From a one-page portfolio to multi-tenant SaaS. Pick the build that fits, then choose the tier. Hover a card for the highlights.

  • Portfolio

    Presentation sites that put a person or business online with credibility.

    • Custom brand design
    • On-page SEO
    • Built to convert enquiries

  • Restaurant

    Digital menus, online ordering, table reservations, and delivery info.

    • Online ordering
    • Reservations
    • Multi-venue ready

  • Booking

    Live-availability scheduling for any business that books clients in.

    • Calendar sync
    • Deposits via Stripe
    • SMS reminders

  • E-commerce

    Stores with checkout, Click & Collect, and delivery — single or multi-branch.

    • Stripe checkout
    • Delivery zones
    • Admin dashboard

  • School & Coaching

    Course listings, online enrolment, student portals, and progress tracking.

    • Enrolment + payments
    • Student portal
    • Multi-campus

  • Community

    Forums and social platforms with profiles, messaging, and moderation.

    • Real-time chat
    • Memberships
    • Roles & gamification

  • Directory

    Searchable listing platforms with reviews, categories, and claim-your-business.

    • Featured listings
    • Ratings & reviews
    • Subscription plans

  • Job Board

    Two-sided platforms where employers post roles and candidates apply.

    • Resume uploads
    • Smart matching
    • Employer plans

  • Blog

    Fast, SEO-friendly publishing platforms with a clean editorial CMS.

    • Advanced SEO
    • Memberships
    • Author profiles

  • SaaS

    Subscription products with accounts, dashboards, billing, and multi-tenancy.

    • Stripe billing
    • Role-based access
    • API & webhooks

  • AI Products

    Apps that turn OpenAI and Claude APIs into smart, billable products.

    • Credits & metering
    • Cost tracking
    • Multi-provider
Transparent pricing

Three tiers per build. No hidden numbers.

Every plan is a one-off build price in AUD — and you own the finished site outright. The monthly care plan is optional, covering hosting, security, backups, and support.

Portfolio Websites

Clean presentation sites that put a person or business online.

For: Professionals, tradies, consultants, freelancers

Silver

Get started
$490one-off

+ $29/mo care plan · optional

  • Single-page website
  • Mobile-responsive design
  • Contact form
  • Social media links
  • Basic SEO setup
  • 1 year hosting + domain setup
  • Email support
Start with Silver
Most popular

Gold

Most popular
$990one-off

+ $49/mo care plan · optional

Everything in Silver, plus:

  • Up to 5 pages
  • Custom design to match your brand
  • Photo gallery / portfolio showcase
  • Google Maps + business hours
  • On-page SEO optimisation
  • Google Analytics setup
  • Priority support
Start with Gold

Platinum

Built to scale
$1,990one-off

+ $79/mo care plan · optional

Everything in Gold, plus:

  • Up to 10 pages
  • Blog / news section (CMS)
  • Booking / enquiry system
  • Newsletter signup integration
  • Advanced SEO + performance tuning
  • Custom animations & polish
  • Copywriting assistance
  • Premium priority support
Start with Platinum

Add-ons & extras

Mix and match with any plan to tailor it to your business.

  • Mobile app (iOS & Android)

    From $2,500+ — App Store & Google Play deployment, push notifications, and ongoing maintenance.

  • Extra product / content loading

    Bulk product, menu, or listing population with descriptions.

  • Copywriting & content

    Professional words for pages, products, and SEO.

  • Logo & brand kit

    Logo, colours, and a simple brand style guide.

  • SMS notifications

    Text reminders and alerts (message usage billed at cost).

  • Multi-language

    Add extra languages, including right-to-left (e.g. Arabic).

Payment terms

  • 50% deposit to begin, 50% on completion before launch.
  • Care plans are billed monthly in advance and can be cancelled anytime.
  • Any features beyond the agreed scope are quoted separately.
  • Domain, AI usage, and SMS costs are billed at cost or paid directly to the provider.

All prices are in Australian dollars (AUD). Plans are a starting point — every project can be tailored, and features can be mixed between tiers. SaaS and AI products are quoted to your specific scope. Final scope and price are confirmed in writing before any work begins.

How it works

A clear path from first call to a site that's live.

  1. 01

    Discovery

    We map your goals, audience, and the one action the site must drive.

  2. 02

    Research

    Competitors, references, and structure — decided before any design starts.

  3. 03

    Design

    A custom interface built to your brand, reviewed together before build.

  4. 04

    Development

    Built on a fast, secure, modern stack with clean, handover-ready code.

  5. 05

    Testing

    Devices, speed, accessibility, and edge cases checked end to end.

  6. 06

    Launch

    We go live with training so you can run it from day one.

  7. 07

    Ongoing support

    Optional care plan for hosting, updates, backups, and changes.

Typical timelines

After deposit and content are received. Final timing depends on scope and how quickly content arrives.

  • Portfolio & Blog1–2 weeks
  • Restaurant & Booking2–3 weeks
  • E-commerce & School / Coaching3–5 weeks
  • Directory & Job Board4–6 weeks
  • Community4–7 weeks
  • AI-Powered apps4–8 weeks
  • SaaS products8–12 weeks+
Why clients stay

Built on trust, priced in plain English.

“He took our shop online without the marketplace fees. Orders started the first week and I can manage everything myself.”

Independent grocer

E-commerce, South-West Sydney

“The price we agreed was the price we paid. Clear scope, no surprises, and the site is genuinely fast.”

Multi-branch retailer

E-commerce, 7 locations

“We needed delivery tracking that kept each business's data separate. It works, and the dashboard makes the day obvious.”

Wholesale operator

Logistics SaaS, Sydney Markets

  • Australian-owned and run
  • Fast turnaround
  • Transparent fixed pricing
  • Premium ongoing support
  • Modern, fast technology
  • You own the source code
  • SEO-ready on launch
  • Performance-focused builds
Questions, answered

Everything you'd ask on the first call.

Still unsure which plan fits? Tell me what you have in mind and I'll recommend the right one — or put together a custom quote.

  • Every service comes in three fixed tiers — Silver, Gold, and Platinum. Each is a one-off build price in AUD, and you own the finished site outright. An optional monthly care plan covers hosting, security, backups, and support.
